item.title: US pressure on Greenland is ‘totally unacceptable’, says Danish PM – Europe live

item.title: Four new astronauts arrive via SpaceX rocket at International Space Station
item.description: ISS now fully crewed after a medical issue forced the evacuation of four astronauts in January The International Space Station (ISS) returned to full ...

item.title: Nobel laureate transferred to prison in northern Iran without warning
item.description: Concern grows over Narges Mohammadi’s health, family says, after reports of ‘life-threatening mistreatment’ Iranian authorities have without prior war...

item.title: Girl, 17, who died after three-car crash in Cwmbran was ‘funny, kind and caring’
item.description: Family pay tribute to Demi Edmunds, from Caldicot, saying she ‘loved her friends, and she was loved by all’ A 17-year-old girl who died in a collision...

item.title: Rental ebike programs booming in Australian cities as e-scooter ‘moral panic’ sees take-up stall
item.description: After a fast kick-off in Australia, e-scooter hire crackdowns fuelled by safety concerns have seen shared ebikes pull ahead Get our breaking news emai...
